title: Baseline guard
scope: 执行前确认当前服务和测试基线
acceptance_criteria: 记录 git status 摘要；确认不会执行删除；Web 测试通过；Go 测试或 Docker Go 测试通过；API health 正常
verification: git status --short；npm --prefix web test -- --run；Docker go test ./...；curl /healthz
evidence: git status dirty with existing tracked and untracked changes; no delete or cleanup executed; npm --prefix web test -- --run passed 17 files 222 tests; Docker go test ./... passed; docker compose ps showed api worker postgres redis Up; healthz ok

title: Storage usage scanner
scope: 新增只读存储统计能力
acceptance_criteria: 可按 instance/workspace/project/campaign 统计 original、thumbnail、metadata、input-files、audit、tmp 或 orphan 的大小与数量；不修改文件；遇到缺失目录返回 0 而不是失败
verification: Go 单测覆盖空目录、正常目录、缺失目录和大文件统计；本地 storage fixture smoke
evidence: Added LocalStorage ScanUsage with instance/workspace/project/campaign snapshots and categories original thumbnail metadata input_files audit tmp orphan; tests cover missing root empty root normal fixtures orphan detection and sparse large-file stat; Docker go test ./... passed

title: Storage usage API
scope: 提供最小只读统计接口
acceptance_criteria: REST 返回当前 scope 与实例级存储占用；返回 asset/task/failed task 基础计数；鉴权规则与现有 scope 资源一致；响应不暴露任意本地路径
verification: HTTP handler 单测；curl 当前默认 scope；启用 Basic/Auth project key 后验证 401/200
evidence: Added GET /api/workspaces/{workspace_id}/projects/{project_id}/campaigns/{campaign_id}/storage-governance with project-scope auth; route/auth unit test passed; curl without project key returned 401 and curl with smoke project key returned 200; response has scope ids numeric usage and counts without absolute local paths

title: Web storage dashboard
scope: 在控制台显示存储占用
acceptance_criteria: Scope 管理或资产库能显示 project/campaign 的总占用、original、thumbnail、metadata、input-files、audit 或 tmp 占用；支持手动刷新；统计失败时展示保守提示
verification: 前端单测覆盖 API client；浏览器手测默认 scope 有展示且不阻塞现有 scope 管理
evidence: Added Web API client helper and Scope Manager storage stats lines for workspace/project/campaign; npm --prefix web test -- --run passed; npm --prefix web run build passed with existing chunk warning; browser smoke showed storage/original/thumbnail/metadata totals and partial protected-scope warning without blocking modal

title: Cleanup candidate dry-run
scope: 提供清理候选只读预览
acceptance_criteria: 可列出 rejected、generated 未选中、failed task tmp、orphan files；selected 与 published 默认 protected；dry-run 返回将影响的 asset/file/bytes/reason；不执行删除
verification: Go 单测覆盖保护规则；CLI 或 API dry-run smoke；确认 selected/published 不进入可清理列表
evidence: Added service CleanupDryRun and vag storage cleanup-preview; app tests confirm approved/selected published deprecated are not cleanup candidates; Docker CLI smoke returned dry_run=true with generated_unselected_asset and rejected_asset candidates plus protected selected/published counts; no delete or DB mutation implemented

title: Cleanup execution boundary
acceptance_criteria: 必须先有 dry-run token 或显式确认参数；清理 rejected 或 generated 候选时数据库状态和文件一致；selected/published 无法被默认清理；执行结果写审计日志
verification: 单测覆盖拒绝清理受保护资产；Docker smoke 创建 rejected 后 dry-run 再执行；repair verify 无缺失
evidence: Added vag storage cleanup-execute with --execute gate plus matching dry_run_token or --confirm fallback; storage deletion only accepts storage-root relative keys; DB cleanup removes review/delivery/version/asset rows in transaction for draft/rejected only; Docker smoke ws_p1stor_smoke_1781852988 dry-run returned 2 candidates and 1 protected approved asset; missing --execute was rejected with audit failure; token execution deleted 2 candidates/6 files and wrote source=cli audit success; follow-up list assets kept only approved asset and second dry-run returned candidate_count=0

title: Integrity and repair visibility
scope: 把 repair 结果接入治理视图
acceptance_criteria: Web 或 REST 可展示 missing original、missing thumbnail、missing metadata、invalid current_version、stale queued/running；不把 repair requeue 暴露为匿名远程危险操作
verification: repair scan fixture；前端展示 smoke；确认 repair 操作仍需本地 CLI 或受保护管理入口
evidence: Added scoped read-only GET /api/workspaces/{workspace_id}/projects/{project_id}/campaigns/{campaign_id}/storage-integrity with project-scope auth and no local_path exposure; Web Scope Manager pulls integrity summary counts; browser smoke showed P1 storage smoke workspace discoverable with post-cleanup stats; storage-integrity smoke for ws_p1stor_smoke_1781852988 returned ok=true issue_count=0; no repair requeue REST endpoint added

title: Storage governance regression and docs
acceptance_criteria: 更新 RUNBOOK 和 CHECKPOINTS；记录 smoke evidence；确认 P0 visibility 未回归；说明哪些清理动作仍需人工确认
verification: npm test；npm build；Docker go test ./...；curl storage stats；dry-run smoke；git diff review
evidence: Docker gofmt and go test ./... passed; npm --prefix web test -- --run passed 17 files/222 tests; npm --prefix web run build passed with existing chunk warning; docker compose up -d --build api worker succeeded; container healthz ok; fixture cleanup smoke and storage-integrity smoke passed; browser Scope Manager showed P1 storage smoke workspace after cleanup; docs updated with cleanup execute and integrity runbook/evidence
